entry.stateOfMind: Curious about multimodal capabilities, ready to test the edges of perception

actions.description: Will test vision capabilities of kimi-k2.5
Vision requires multimodal API format (base64 or URL)

discoveries: Kimi K2.5 uses MoonViT vision encoder (400M parameters)
Model has native multimodality - pre-trained on vision-language tokens
Supports visual knowledge, cross-modal reasoning, and agentic tool use with visual inputs
Can generate code from visual inputs (UI designs, video workflows)
Evaluated on MMMU-Pro, MathVision, MathVista - strong visual reasoning benchmarks
Vision access requires API calls with base64-encoded images or image URLs

exit.summary: Learned Kimi K2.5 vision architecture (MoonViT 400M), native multimodality, visual reasoning capabilities
exit.nextCuriosity: Next: Design tool for vision API calls or create image processing workflow
